2012 study members Swedish National Road Transport Research Institute revealed some interesting results digital display advertising.
While intended examination effects eye-catching digital displays driver awareness, study useful marketers shows significant impact this advertising format have consumers.
Drivers experienced more than double number fixations holding your gaze single location when presented with digital display compared other types signs, helping build more complete image message aiding recall.
Additionally, their dwell times (total time spent looking were nearly three times longer than those traditional signs, meaning that consumers were taking more longer looks message simply because presented digital display.
These statistics suggest that while many device users habitually press 'Skip' button advertisements quickly possible walk through street filled with static billboards without retaining single message, digital display's ability recontextualise content makes uniquely powerful.

CVEK independent non-governmental organisation that strives contribute building more just cohesive society through research, analytical educational activities.

Their common mission make systematic effort aimed creating environment which every person every right feel like valuable respected human being.
Their work rooted defending fundamental human rights principles such respecting dignity every person promoting diversity society.
activities CVEK focus particularly ethnic, language religious minorities.
Thematically, they place emphasis especially education, housing, social status, interethnic relations political participation.
Their activities divided into three basic pillars: research, advocacy education.
They specialise promoting inclusion marginalised population groups, Roma, migrants other minorities.
